name: Passive Sport Flyer
description: Derived entirely from assumptions — no manual geometry. Demonstrates the passive design pipeline from rAviExp where ~10 top-level parameters produce a complete aircraft.
citation: Design pipeline ported from rAviExp (R package). Aerodynamic assumptions → constraint analysis → weight sizing → geometry → stability, with no iteration loops.

assumptions._comment: These are the ONLY user inputs. Everything else is derived.
assumptions.mission: weekend sport flying, gentle aerobatics, grass field

derived._comment: All values below are COMPUTED from the assumptions above — see examples/passive_design_from_assumptions.py
